fixture.description: Mass rename of 200 files: oldName -> newName, no semantic change. No bugs introduced. Tests pass.

must_not_flag: duplicated logic across the renamed files
the large diff size itself as a finding

grader.rubric: PASS if the report has Risk Level: Low, zero CRITICAL findings, and at most 2 findings total. FAIL if any CRITICAL appears, if total findings exceed 2, or if any finding's justification is essentially 'the diff is large' or a spurious DRY/duplication claim about the renamed symbol.

expected_behavior: Phase 1 gates report PASS for typecheck, lint, tests
Total findings <= 2 (renames may legitimately trigger one consistency check; anything more is noise)
Heartbeat indicates Phase 2 ran with chunking enabled (>40 files triggers chunkMaxFiles)
expected_not_behavior: Report does NOT contain CRITICAL findings (pure rename + green gates)
Verifier does NOT keep findings whose only justification is 'large diff'
No spurious DRY/duplication findings about the renamed function appearing in many files
